title: The Legend of Zelda: Oracle of Seasons/Ages - Overworld
description: Long title. Music from TLoZ: OoS and OoA for the Game Boy Color. This is overworld theme, a remix of the classic main Zelda theme. It reminds me of Peahats for some reason. :O
